name: @construct/app
description: Construct desktop IDE for executable learning tapes.
author: Abhinav Mishra <abhinav@tryconstruct.cc>

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist/main.cjs file:dist/preload.cjs && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/main/config/constructConfig.test.ts src/main/agent-tools/constructTapeTools.test.ts src/main/constructAgentModels.test.ts src/main/constructAiFeatures.test.ts src/main/constructInteractAgent.test.ts src/main/constructInteractTools.test.ts src/main/constructLearningStore.test.ts src/main/flow/ConstructFlowService.test.ts src/main/generatedLiveSteps.test.ts src/main/constructSelectionExplainAgent.test.ts src/renderer/construct/ConstructSettingsSurface.test.ts src/renderer/construct/components/ConstructInteractSession.test.ts src/renderer/construct/components/StepList.test.ts src/renderer/construct/components/Workspace.render-stability.test.ts src/renderer/construct/lib/documentSession.test.ts src/renderer/construct/lib/inlineRefs.test.ts src/renderer/construct/lib/parser.test.ts src/renderer/construct/lib/selectionContext.test.ts src/renderer/construct/compiler/parser.test.ts src/renderer/construct/compiler/pipeline.test.ts
